2356910.name: Gifted Island
2356910.description:
Story

.

Inheritance Mystery ADV.
After the death of his grandmother, whom he had not seen for years, the story of his inheritance comes to Ronnie, the main character. When Ronnie visits his hometown island to complete the inheritance procedures, he meets Lily, a self-proclaimed spirit who appears out of the blue.
Lily is a genie who can give special talents to those who contract with her, and those who contract with her are called "gifted.
"If I make a contract with a genie, can I become a gifted person too?
If so, help me become a gifted person by making a contract with me!　
Then I will give you this house."
Will Ronnie really be able to make a contract with the genie?
And why does she want the house that Ronnie inherits?
This is a mystery adventure game with fantasy elements, in which spirits and humans are interwoven around an inheritance. Please enjoy solving mysteries related to the inheritance with Ronnie!


Features

.
This is a visual novel adventure game in which players advance the story by searching for objects and making choices. The storyline branches off depending on the player's choices, and the story changes depending on the player's choices with the adoption of a multiple ending.
.

Lots of movie parts!
Aiming for a visual novel experience similar to watching a movie, we paid particular attention to the movie parts!

.

Character


.
Main character
Ronnie.
He visited his home island to inherit his grandmother's estate.

.
Lily.
A spirit who appears before Ronnie in order to obtain his grandmother's house.
She has the ability to turn into anything.

.
Flora.
Ronnie's first love. She is an accessory artist on the island.
She is a kind and good-natured woman who is kind to everyone.
